rows.label: tev072801_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev078001_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Mon'barac about the Lifepoint.

rows.label: tev078001_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev072801_SEL0021
rows.name:
Ask Mon'barac if anything
is troubling him.

rows.label: tev072801_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Mon'barac about the Central Life.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072801_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask Mon'barac about the Lifepoint.

rows.label: tev072801_MSG0001
rows.name:
I understand that a multitude
of Earth plants are also being
stored in the Lifepoint.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072801_MSG0002
rows.name:
As a botanist, I would be delighted to
have an opportunity to study them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072801_MSG0003
rows.name:
I suppose we can only pray that priceless
treasure trove was not among the Lifepoint
parts destroyed by Goetia.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072801_MSG0008
rows.name:
Due to advanced technology and
prudent oversight, this ship is
flawless in all aspects but one.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072801_MSG0009
rows.name:
Alas, that one aspect is something
of a deal-breaker to we Orphe.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072801_MSG0010
rows.name:
...What is it, you ask? It's
that this is the only plant
that exists on the entire ship![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072801_MSG0011
rows.name:
This is completely insufficient to meet our
dietary needs. We have no choice but to disembark
to NLA and seek out appropriate foliage there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072801_MSG0025
rows.name:
It's certainly nice that you will be
able to resurrect your fallen if you
should locate your Central Life.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072801_MSG0026
rows.name:
But I understand that, as of yet,
there are a great many dead humans
you still have to revive.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072801_MSG0027
rows.name:
Consider we Orphe, who are able to regrow
entire limbs much like the shoots of zesian
fleawort that abound on this planet.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072801_MSG0028
rows.name:
Wouldn't you agree that our
bodies are far more practical?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072801_MSG0029
rows.name:
Well, to be fair, they are so
pitifully frail that we are
useless in combat, but still...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072801_MSG0034
rows.name:
Now that you've found the Central
Life, will you be ceasing your search
for the remaining Lifepoint parts?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072801_MSG0035
rows.name:
I must admit that I'm curious to
learn as much as I can about the
world from which you hail.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072801_MSG0036
rows.name:
As your Lifepoint is a repository for
information about Earth, I hope you
will allow me to study its archives.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072801_MSG0037
rows.name:
I understand there are still pieces
to be found, so I hope you will
recover them in all due haste.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072801_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072801_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Mon'barac about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072801_MSG0014
rows.name:
I have learned a great many
things from you and Naza.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072801_MSG0015
rows.name:
All xenoforms, no matter their
shape, possess something that is
as vital to them as our Ovah.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072801_MSG0016
rows.name:
I believe that must be true of you humans
as well. Surely you possess something
that's as precious to you as life itself?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072801_MSG0017
rows.name:
If so, I hope that when next we
speak, you'll tell me what it is. I
want to understand more about you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072801_SEL2021
rows.name: Ask Mon'barac about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072801_MSG0018
rows.name:
When I saw Yun'tonam get assaulted by
Naza, I felt strangely...envious.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072801_MSG0019
rows.name:
What could such an emotion possibly
mean? What has happened to me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072801_MSG0020
rows.name:
Perhaps something disturbing
has begun to sprout within me.[ST:wait ]
